summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 25 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations, merges, fix PRs, or close actions are planned; close and merge gates are not satisfied and the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr.

actions.reason: Auth-sidecar repair PR with unique scope and insufficient proof; keep as independent backlog item.
